_comment: AOI names verified from .aois files in d:/ET Demo/visial/. Correct AOIs are explicitly labelled 'answer' (or 'answer1') in the visial .aois files. Distractor AOIs use M1-M15 or aoi1-aoi9 naming.

findDice._note: CONFIRMED — 'answer' AOI covers the actual dice object (X:722-883, Y:123-232 in 957x508 image). Source: findDiceAois.aois (visial).

findYummy._note: CONFIRMED — 'answer' AOI covers the region containing the hidden word YUMMY (X:28-108, Y:349-408 in 600x553 image). Source: findYummyAois.aois (visial).

frogInBathroom._note: CONFIRMED — 'answer1' AOI covers the area where the frog is hidden (X:268-348, Y:335-415 in 1443x1436 image). Source: frogInBathroomAois.aois (visial).

headphoneInBathroom._note: CONFIRMED — 'answer' AOI covers the area where headphones are hidden (X:456-598, Y:606-690 in 1188x1271 image). Source: headphoneInBathroomAois.aois (visial).

frog._note: CONFIRMED — 'answer' AOI covers the frog that is visually different from the others (X:1085-1226, Y:522-621 in 1346x954 image). Source: frogAois.aois (visial).

whoCheats._note: CONFIRMED — 'answer' AOI covers the cheating student (X:224-315, Y:309-383 in 944x533 image). Source: whoCheatsAois.aois (visial).

whoThief._note: CONFIRMED — 'answer' AOI covers the thief (X:222-271, Y:248-298 in 950x526 image). Source: whoThiefAois.aois (visial).

spotNeedleInst._note: CONFIRMED — 'answer' AOI covers the needle location (X:544-589, Y:575-662 in 601x699 image). Source: spotNeedleInstAois.aois (visial).
